videos.title: The Biggest Takeaways From Apple's WWDC 2026
videos.description:
Apple revealed its AI-powered next chapter at WWDC 2026 — and not only were we there, we were part of it. Engadget executive editor Cherlynn Low joined Brenda Stolyar, senior staff writer at Wirecutter, Yahoo Finance tech editor Daniel Howley, and Judner Aura (@uravgconsumer) for a panel discussion on Apple's big plans for 2026 and beyond.

#WWDC2026 #AppleIntelligence #AI

Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/c/Engadget
